problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Glial. Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
